name: time-tracker-ai
description: Track work time with start/stop timers, log entries, and generate reports. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: start_timer
tools.description: Start a time tracking timer for a project. Optionally add a task description and comma-separated tags.

tools.name: stop_timer
tools.description: Stop the running timer and log the time entry. Optionally add notes.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Generate a time report. Optionally filter by project. Shows totals per project and per day.

tools.name: list_entries
tools.description: List recent time entries. Optionally filter by project. Returns up to limit entries (default 20).
